_meta.purpose: Diff 13 derivation tunables — everything the migration needs that is NOT a ruled baseline value. Ruled values live in expert_baseline_by_level.json (D. Whitfield, EST). These are the structural knobs David ruled 2026-07-18 (rulings 1-5) plus the corollary rules he accepted as drafted.
_meta.discipline: no numbers in migration code — script reads this file + the baseline file only

pension_REW_BEN_112.ruling: 1 - national ladder for all 220; public-sector DB carve-out DEFERRED to next baseline round
pension_REW_BEN_112.offset_note: org generosity offset in pp, latent-anchored percentile lookup; median 0 so level medians pin to baseline
pension_REW_BEN_112.floor_rule: floor rows (offered=floor in baseline shape): value = statutory_floor if offset <= 1 else statutory_floor + (offset - 1); ~75% sit exactly at the floor so the median pins

pens_emp_max_REW_BEN_PENS_EMP_MAX_01.ruling: 4 - corollary: per-org max = that org's typical + headroom (the original driver's own +1-4pp rule)
pens_emp_max_REW_BEN_PENS_EMP_MAX_01.headroom_note: senior 2-4pp (median 3), rest 1-3pp (median ~1.5) - compensates the pension offset's positive skew so achieved medians land at David's accepted ~20/15/12/10/10/5/5; all within the driver's 1-4pp

car_fa0f46f6.ruling: 2 - population = CAR_STATUS_01 Yes-set; retires the 58-org incoherence; 'Car 41' Diff-9 persona figure noted as discrepancy for the record
car_fa0f46f6.manager_note: top share by latent rank among offering orgs answer the Manager row - renders rare (n~17, above n>=5 floor)
car_fa0f46f6.manager_membership: independent hash u01 - decoupled from the value scale so the offering minority is not the generous minority
car_fa0f46f6.value_scale: within-row ranked symmetric band (latent-ordered) - subset median scale = 1.0 so each row's median pins to the baseline exactly

bonus_REW_INC_111.ruling: 3-gate per baseline SECTOR_GATE; thinning keeps the CURRENT level-participation proportions applied to the gated population
bonus_REW_INC_111.bottom_note: piecewise median-pinned draw min->base->max within row, clamped monotone against the row above
bonus_REW_INC_111.value_scale: within-row ranked symmetric band (latent-ordered) - pins each participating row's median to baseline despite participation thinning

bonus_max_323ffcf1-749b-43f3-bf34-1de6b8.ruling: 4 - gate-only; values untouched; per-org max >= target asserted, violations lifted to target

lti_REW_INC_133.ruling: 3 - population 74: current any-Yes orgs minus charity/public minus SME (50-249)
lti_REW_INC_133.assignment: rank running orgs by latent desc: top round(0.70*N) get Board+Director Yes; next up to round(0.90*N) get Board only; remainder No everywhere; nothing below Director ever Yes

lti_values_REW_INC_LTI_MAX_01_and_TYP.ruling: 4 - cliff-mask only: delete rows below Director everywhere; delete rows for orgs not eligibility-Yes at that row; values untouched pending next baseline round

verdict_suppression.ruling: full suppression per baseline-file default (not the softer indicative channel)
verdict_suppression.mechanism: SURGICAL edit of the curated data/market_position_config.json (11 entries -> direction neutral, _diff13 breadcrumb) + questions.polarity -> neutral. NOT via gen_market_position_config.py --write: the generator has drifted from the curated artifact (1,716 lines rewritten on regen, clobbering David-refined class/domain rulings — persona-config-clobber class). Generator RESOLUTIONS + neutral handling updated for consistency, but the curated file is authoritative.

deferred_log: public-sector pension realism (elevated flat-ish DB structure, ~20 charity/public orgs) - next baseline round
annual-leave baseline parked: NO leave-by-level matrix exists (vacuous); retail/hospitality 20-day band = future gated HOL_001 diff
expert max figures for PENS_EMP_MAX / 323ffcf1 / LTI value pair if David prefers over the derivations
Diff-9 persona 'Car 41' vs CAR_STATUS_01 74-Yes discrepancy - register/persona reconcile at next pass

gen_market_position_config.py has drifted from the curated data/market_position_config.json - a --write regen clobbers David-refined rulings (Governance flag, REW_PAY_005 Practice, 8-domain taxonomy). Reconcile generator to curated state or retire the generator. Until then: NEVER --write it.

_population.rule: seed orgs only - orgs present in org_profiles.json/org_profiles_inferred.json; real signup orgs (e.g. Tester) are NEVER rewritten
